intent_precise: Thermocycler Example Protocol: With type_tc module. (1) Close thermocycler lid. (2) Operate thermocycler. (3) Set temperature to init_temp°C. (4) Run thermocycler profile for no_cycles cycles. (5) Set temperature to fe_temp°C. (6) Set temperature to final_temp°C.
intent_concise: Perform temperature control (fe_temp°C, final_temp°C, init_temp°C), thermocycling.
intent: To run the Thermocycler Example Protocol, start by closing the thermocycler lid and powering up the unit. First, set the initial temperature to init_temp°C, then execute the thermocycler profile for no_cycles cycles. After the cycling is complete, adjust the temperature to fe_temp°C, and finally bring it down to the final temperature of final_temp°C to finish the protocol.
